description: Create comprehensive multi-panel provenance figure summarizing all evidence
code:
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use('Agg')
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig = plt.figure(figsize=(16, 14))

# Create grid layout
gs = fig.add_gridspec(3, 2, height_ratios=[1.2, 1.5, 1.0], hspace=0.35, wspace=0.3)

# ============================================
# Panel A: Catalytic tetrad comparison table
# ============================================
ax_table = fig.add_subplot(gs[0, :])
ax_table.axis('off')
ax_table.set_title('A. Catalytic Tetrad Conservation in PIWI Domain\n(Aligned to HsAGO2 D597-E637-D669-H807)', 
                    fontsize=13, fontweight='bold', loc='left', pad=10)

# Table data
proteins = ['HsAGO2\n(reference)', 'CSR-1\n(slicer ✓)', 'WAGO-4\n(test)']
positions = ['D1\n(D597)', 'E\n(E637)', 'D2\n(D669)', 'H\n(H807)']

cell_text = [
    ['D597', 'E637', 'D669', 'H807'],
    ['D743', 'E785', 'D817', 'D955'],
    ['G676', 'D714/M620', 'T756', 'N913'],
]

# Color coding
cell_colors = [
    ['#27ae60', '#27ae60', '#27ae60', '#27ae60'],  # HsAGO2 - all green (reference)
    ['#27ae60', '#27ae60', '#27ae60', '#f39c12'],  # CSR-1 - D/H variant at H
    ['#e74c3c', '#f39c12', '#e74c3c', '#e74c3c'],  # WAGO-4 - mostly red
]

table = ax_table.table(
    cellText=cell_text,
    rowLabels=proteins,
    colLabels=positions,
    cellColours=cell_colors,
    loc='center',
    cellLoc='center'
)
table.auto_set_font_size(False)
table.set_fontsize(11)
table.scale(1.4, 1.8)

for (row, col), cell in table.get_celld().items():
    if row == 0:
        cell.set_text_props(weight='bold', fontsize=10, color='white')
        cell.set_facecolor('#2c3e50')
    if col == -1:
        cell.set_text_props(weight='bold', fontsize=10)
        cell.set_facecolor('#ecf0f1')
    cell.set_text_props(fontsize=11)

# ============================================
# Panel B: Motif conservation detail
# ============================================
ax_motif = fig.add_subplot(gs[1, :])
ax_motif.axis('off')
ax_motif.set_title('B. Conserved Sequence Motif Analysis around Catalytic Sites', 
                    fontsize=13, fontweight='bold', loc='left', pad=10)

motif_data = [
    {
        'label': 'D1 site (DVTH motif)',
        'ref':   'PVIFLGADVTHPPAG',
        'csr1':  'PTMVVGIDVTHPTQA',
        'wago4': 'SHLIIGVGISAPPAG',
        'ref_cat': 8,  # position of D in the motif
    },
    {
        'label': 'D2 site (RDGV motif)',
        'ref':   'TRIIFYRDGVSEGQF',
        'csr1':  'ARIIVYRDGVSEGQF',
        'wago4': 'RRVIVYRTGTSEGNH',
        'ref_cat': 7,
    },
    {
        'label': 'H site (YxHLVA motif)',
        'ref':   'PAPAYYAHLVAFRAR',
        'csr1':  'PTPVYYADLVATRAR',
        'wago4': 'PTPLYVANEYAKRGR',
        'ref_cat': 8,
    },
]

y_start = 0.92
for idx, md in enumerate(motif_data):
    y = y_start - idx * 0.32
    
    # Label
    ax_motif.text(0.02, y, md['label'], fontsize=11, fontweight='bold',
                  transform=ax_motif.transAxes, va='top', family='sans-serif')
    
    y_line = y - 0.06
    labels = ['HsAGO2:', 'CSR-1: ', 'WAGO-4:']
    seqs = [md['ref'], md['csr1'], md['wago4']]
    colors_list = ['#2c3e50', '#27ae60', '#e74c3c']
    
    for j, (lbl, seq, clr) in enumerate(zip(labels, seqs, colors_list)):
        yy = y_line - j * 0.07
        ax_motif.text(0.05, yy, lbl, fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', color=clr,
                      transform=ax_motif.transAxes, va='top', family='monospace')
        
        for k, ch in enumerate(seq):
            x_pos = 0.16 + k * 0.022
            # Highlight catalytic position
            if k == md['ref_cat']:
                if j == 0:
                    bg_color = '#27ae60'
                elif seq[k] == md['ref'][k]:
                    bg_color = '#27ae60'
                elif seq[k] in 'DE' and md['ref'][k] in 'DE':
                    bg_color = '#f39c12'
                elif seq[k] in 'DH' and md['ref'][k] in 'DH':
                    bg_color = '#f39c12'
                else:
                    bg_color = '#e74c3c'
                
                ax_motif.text(x_pos, yy, ch, fontsize=11, fontweight='bold',
                             transform=ax_motif.transAxes, va='top', family='monospace',
                             bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.15', facecolor=bg_color, 
                                      edgecolor='black', alpha=0.8),
                             color='white')
            else:
                # Color matching residues
                match = seq[k] == md['ref'][k]
                text_color = '#2c3e50' if match else '#95a5a6'
                weight = 'bold' if match else 'normal'
                ax_motif.text(x_pos, yy, ch, fontsize=10, fontweight=weight,
                             transform=ax_motif.transAxes, va='top', family='monospace',
                             color=text_color)

# ============================================
# Panel C: Evidence summary
# ============================================
ax_summary = fig.add_subplot(gs[2, 0])
ax_summary.axis('off')
ax_summary.set_title('C. Evidence Summary', fontsize=13, fontweight='bold', loc='left', pad=10)

evidence_text = (
    "• PMID:17110334 (Yigit et al.): WAGOs \"lack key\n"
    "  residues required for mRNA cleavage\"\n\n"
    "• PMID:29791857 (Xu et al.): WAGO-4 binds 22G-RNAs;\n"
    "  functions in RNAi inheritance (no cleavage reported)\n\n"
    "• PMID:37505984 (Du et al.): WAGO-4 is \"carrier of\n"
    "  gene silencing memories\"\n\n"
    "• PMID:38477356 (Pal et al.): ALG-1/ALG-2 are \"the\n"
    "  only two slicing Argonautes\" in C. elegans miRNA pathway"
)
ax_summary.text(0.05, 0.95, evidence_text, fontsize=9, transform=ax_summary.transAxes,
               va='top', family='sans-serif', linespacing=1.3)

# ============================================
# Panel D: Verdict
# ============================================
ax_verdict = fig.add_subplot(gs[2, 1])
ax_verdict.axis('off')
ax_verdict.set_title('D. Curation Verdict', fontsize=13, fontweight='bold', loc='left', pad=10)

verdict_box = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch(
    (0.05, 0.15), 0.9, 0.75, boxstyle="round,pad=0.05",
    facecolor='#fadbd8', edgecolor='#e74c3c', linewidth=2,
    transform=ax_verdict.transAxes
)
ax_verdict.add_patch(verdict_box)

ax_verdict.text(0.5, 0.72, 'OVER-ANNOTATED', fontsize=18, fontweight='bold',
               color='#c0392b', ha='center', transform=ax_verdict.transAxes)
ax_verdict.text(0.5, 0.55, 'GO:0004521 (RNA endonuclease activity)',
               fontsize=10, ha='center', transform=ax_verdict.transAxes, color='#2c3e50')
ax_verdict.text(0.5, 0.42, 'should be REMOVED from WAGO-4',
               fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', ha='center', transform=ax_verdict.transAxes,
               color='#c0392b')
ax_verdict.text(0.5, 0.28, 'IBA phylogenetic transfer does not\naccount for catalytic residue loss',
               fontsize=9, ha='center', transform=ax_verdict.transAxes, color='#7f8c8d',
               linespacing=1.4)

# Add legend for colors at bottom
fig.text(0.5, 0.01, 
         '■ Conserved    ■ Conservative substitution (D/E or D/H)    ■ Non-conservative substitution (catalytic activity lost)',
         ha='center', fontsize=10,
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='white', edgecolor='gray', alpha=0.8))

# Color the legend squares
fig.text(0.21, 0.01, '■', ha='center', fontsize=14, color='#27ae60')
fig.text(0.385, 0.01, '■', ha='center', fontsize=14, color='#f39c12')
fig.text(0.59, 0.01, '■', ha='center', fontsize=14, color='#e74c3c')

plt.suptitle('WAGO-4 (O62275) GO:0004521 Hypothesis Evaluation\nCatalytic Tetrad Analysis of the PIWI Domain',
            fontsize=15, fontweight='bold', y=0.99)

plt.savefig('wago4_catalytic_analysis.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Comprehensive figure saved: wago4_catalytic_analysis.png")
